summary: Iteration 97: Tested CineBoard TV Station Leaderboards feature. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified - CineBoard popup menu shows 'Emittenti TV' section with 3 options (Più Viste, Share Settimanale, Share Giornaliero), navigation to /social?view=tv-alltime/weekly/daily works, tab switching between views works, CineBoard link navigates back, release notes v0.150 exists with correct title.
context_for_next_testing_agent: TV Station Leaderboards feature fully working. 3 endpoints tested: /api/cineboard/tv-stations-alltime (sorted by total_viewers), /api/cineboard/tv-stations-weekly (sorted by current_share), /api/cineboard/tv-stations-daily (with live_share field). No TV stations exist currently so all views show empty state 'Nessuna emittente in classifica'. CineBoard popup menu accessible via [data-testid='cineboard-btn'] in top navbar. TV views use query param ?view=tv-alltime/tv-weekly/tv-daily on /social route.

Backend Tests (pytest - 17 tests).TestCineBoardTVStationsAllTime: 4/4 PASSED - Endpoint returns 200, stations array, correct structure with rank/total_viewers/content_count, sorted by total_viewers
Backend Tests (pytest - 17 tests).TestCineBoardTVStationsWeekly: 4/4 PASSED - Endpoint returns 200, stations array, has current_share field, sorted by current_share
Backend Tests (pytest - 17 tests).TestCineBoardTVStationsDaily: 4/4 PASSED - Endpoint returns 200, stations array, has live_share field, correct structure
Backend Tests (pytest - 17 tests).TestReleaseNotesV0150: 2/2 PASSED - Release notes endpoint works, v0.150 exists with title 'CineBoard: Classifiche Emittenti TV'
Backend Tests (pytest - 17 tests).TestCineBoardPopupMenuEndpoints: 2/2 PASSED - All 3 endpoints callable, require authentication

Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile 375x.step_04_tv_options: PASSED - All 3 options visible: 'Più Viste', 'Share Settimanale', 'Share Giornaliero'
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile 375x.step_06_tv_page_load: PASSED - [data-testid='cineboard-tv-page'] loads with title 'Emittenti Più Viste'
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile 375x.step_09_daily_view: PASSED - Tab navigates to /social?view=tv-daily with 'Live (ogni 5 min)' subtitle
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile 375x.step_10_back_to_cineboard: PASSED - 'CineBoard' link navigates back to /social (main film view)
Frontend Tests (Playwright - Mobile 375x.step_11_empty_state: PASSED - 'Nessuna emittente in classifica' message shown

features_verified.GET_cineboard_tv_stations_alltime: VERIFIED - Returns stations sorted by total_viewers with rank, content_count
features_verified.GET_cineboard_tv_stations_weekly: VERIFIED - Returns stations sorted by current_share
features_verified.GET_cineboard_tv_stations_daily: VERIFIED - Returns stations with live_share field (real-time calculation)
features_verified.cineboard_popup_emittenti_tv_section: VERIFIED - 'Emittenti TV' section appears with 3 options
features_verified.tv_view_tabs: VERIFIED - 'Di Sempre', 'Settimanale', 'Giornaliero' tabs work for switching views
features_verified.cineboard_back_link: VERIFIED - 'CineBoard' link navigates back to /social main view
features_verified.release_notes_v0150: VERIFIED - Version 0.150 'CineBoard: Classifiche Emittenti TV' exists

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/tv_alltime_page.png - Shows 'Emittenti Più Viste' with Di Sempre tab active
.screenshots/tv_daily_page.png - Shows 'Share Giornaliero' with Giornaliero tab active
